# trading-r1-qflib

> Honest reimplementation of Trading-R1 (arXiv:2509.11420): Qwen3-4B SFT→GRPO trading signals on
> leak-safe qf-lib backtests, 150 US large caps. Final result is two-layer: prediction is
> information-bound at raw IC ≈ 0.06 and the residual alpha was a universe-selection artifact
> (+0.096 → +0.004 point-in-time), while the RU-conformal CVaR exposure controller is real and
> portable (8 loss streams, tail pinned, costs included). Wiki pages are declarative knowledge;
> dated docs are the evidence chain.

## Knowledge (start here)

- [Wiki home](docs/wiki/home.md): map of all established results
- [Information ceiling](docs/wiki/information-ceiling.md): why no model beats raw IC ~0.06
- [Universe-selection artifact](docs/wiki/universe-selection-artifact.md): where the alpha actually came from
- [CVaR exposure controller](docs/wiki/cvar-exposure-controller.md): the portable product, spec + limits
- [Signals tested](docs/wiki/signals-tested.md): every lever tried, with verdicts — the don't-retry list
- [Measurement traps](docs/wiki/measurement-traps.md): 7 evaluation traps, each paid for once
- [Transaction costs](docs/wiki/transaction-costs.md): cost gate results; MOC dependency
- [Data assets](docs/wiki/data-assets.md): what data exists and what it cannot support
- [Open questions](docs/wiki/open-questions.md): what remains, and its gates

## Narrative & evidence

- [Consolidated write-up](docs/2026-07-18-writeup-two-layer-result.md): the full story with all numbers
- [Docs index](docs/README.md): the dated evidence chain in reading order
- [Progress log](docs/PROGRESS-2026-06-21.md): chronological record
- [Paper summary](docs/trading-r1-paper-summary.md): the paper being reimplemented
- [README](README.md): repo layout, setup, model ladder, reproduction commands

- [Why the ceiling](docs/2026-07-03-why-the-ceiling.md): proxy-inflation + MI measurement detail

- [CVaR control](docs/2026-07-17-cvar-conformal-control.md): controller first results + sweep
